$comment: Showcase dataset — a small VISUAL teaser of cckit, rendered to fixed-size (920×400) screenshots by scripts/showcase.sh (charmbracelet/freeze). Keep this set SHORT and visual: the full command list lives on the CLI reference page as copyable text, not here. Only short, read-only / dry-run commands whose output fits 400px (so nothing clips). Each entry: name (file slug), group, title, cmd, show (optional display string).

commands.name: scan
commands.title: Detect this repo's stack + kit state
